docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $753.81 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT SAGASTUME DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAGASTUME DANIEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAGASTUME DANIEL $753.81 PRINCIPAL, $48.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $802.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, MOVED.
